texts: Run the Claude Code CLI, a Linux sandbox, terminals, file editing, previews, and persisted sessions from one browser workspace.
Not a chat clone — the actual Claude Code CLI runs in a live terminal, reads files, executes commands, edits code, and recovers from errors.
Each Claude Code web session gets an isolated Linux sandbox with Node, git, package managers, and a real shell in seconds.
Give the agent a goal and it works across your project: multi-file edits, dependency installs, test runs, previews, and fixes.
Workspace files and Claude Code session history can persist, so you can close the tab and continue later from the same project state.
Use Claude Code online on a laptop, tablet, or borrowed machine. No SSH keys, Docker setup, or local toolchain required.
Use one clear credit balance for sandbox runtime and platform model usage, with BYOK available when you want to use your own model key.
